7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown — Provided as “€1,700 (exactly within initial budget)” without breakdown; not a complete cost breakdown — not fully specified.
Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, additional_services = 4 out of 7.
